    • getToolStateType

      public static <T extends IState> IStateType<T> getToolStateType(String id)
      Returns the tool state type with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier of the tool state type
      Returns:
      the tool state type with the given id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no such tool state type has been contributed

    • getModuleType

      public static <T extends IModule> IModuleType<T> getModuleType(String id)
      Returns the module type with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier of the module type
      Returns:
      the module type with the given id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no such module type has been contributed
